calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Off Calendar

And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants BODYFI, Inc., a California corporation, and Jon Huy Nguyen, an individual, aka John H. Nguyen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana P. Robles, CSR #1412. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Lisa B. Meier, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Geneva Capital, LLC, a limited liability company.
No appearance by defendants BODYFI, Inc., a California corporation, or Jon Huy Nguyen, an individual, aka John H. Nguyen.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written Agreement, Breach of Personal Guaranty, Indebtedness and Open Book Account was filed on April 8, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant BODYFI, Inc.'s Registered Agent of Process occurred on July 26, 2019 and was effectuated on August 5, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Jon Huy Nguyen, an individual, aka John H. Nguyen, occurred on July 26, 2019 and was effectuated on August 5, 2019.
Default as to defendants BODYFI, Inc. and John Huy Nguyen, aka John H. Nguyen, was entered on September 13, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 1, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 2, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Geneva Capital, LLC, a limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants BODYFI, Inc., a California corporation, and Jon Huy Nguyen, an individual, aka John H. Nguyen, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,988.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,401.11.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $1,192.35.
Total - $58,406.61.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Continued To Jan-15-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
